/usr/bin/ar qc libSECURITY.a CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/secu_defs.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/kdf.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/aes_128_ctr.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/aes_128_cbc_cmac.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/aes_128_ecb.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/sha_256_hmac.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/rijndael.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/snow3g.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/key_nas_deriver.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/nas_stream_eea0.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/nas_stream_eea1.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/nas_stream_eia1.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/nas_stream_eea2.c.o CMakeFiles/SECURITY.dir/openair3/SECU/nas_stream_eia2.c.o common/utils/ds/CMakeFiles/ds.dir/byte_array.c.o common/utils/ds/CMakeFiles/ds.dir/seq_arr.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libSECURITY.a
